npx_runtime_fetch_risk: commands intentionally used npx -y acpx@0.10.0 for Phase -1 capture; V0.1a run path should prefer a pinned local binary/digest.

path_enforcement_conclusion.source_inspection: FileSystemHandlers.resolvePathWithinRoot checks absolute path and isWithinRoot(rootDir, resolved) in acpx@0.10.0 dist/live-checkpoint-CuFft_Nd.js.
path_enforcement_conclusion.summary: acpx@0.10.0 client fs handlers source-resolve absolute paths inside cwd, but Phase -1 did not prove AgentRoleSpec allowed_roots as an OS/filesystem sandbox.
path_enforcement_conclusion.v0_1a_rule: Treat allowed_roots as cwd/config validation only unless a later OS sandbox/path-policy layer is added.

permission_policy_fixture.conclusion: acpx@0.10.0 accepts --permission-policy JSON with autoDeny/defaultAction in the observed runner flag family.

schema_summary.stdout_shape: newline-delimited JSON objects observed from acpx --format json
